text.title: BA Strategic Partnership Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-ba-strategic-partnership.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.code: { "engagement_id": "ACME-2026-Q2", "positioning": "thinking_partner", "decision_rights": [ "BA signs scope changes \u2264 \u20ac50k", "BA may veto requirement-quality risks" ], "escalation_path": "BA \u2192 VP Product \u2192 CEO", "value_contract": "BA contributes strategic problem framing in addition to requirements artefacts; success = reduced rework + faster scope decisions.", "signed_by": [ "amaia@acme.com", "bruno@vendor.io" ] }

example.note: positioning not in enum; engagement_id, decision_rights, escalation_path, value_contract, signed_by all missing.

forbidden.pattern: Stance review claims 'thinking_partner' positioning but no decision_rights are listed.
Partnership charter exists but only BA has signed it.
